title: GodbridgerEssential
body:
🎨 Wool Overlay (Godbridge Edition w/ Godbridging crosshair)

This resource pack adds a clean one-pixel outline to every wool block, and an arrow style crosshair designed specifically to help with godbridge practice and other bridging techniques.
With the subtle texture overlay, colors stay vibrant and easy to distinguish in any environment—whether you’re practicing on land, underwater, or in the sky.

✨ Features

✔️ Perfect one-pixel outline and an arrow 45° crosshair– makes it easier to align blocks while bridging.

✔️ Works with all 16 wool colors.

✔️ Subtle textured overlay – keeps the blocks looking natural, not flat.

✔️ Compatible with any Minecraft version that supports resource packs.

🎯 Why use this pack?

When bridging, precision matters. The outline sits exactly one pixel lower, giving you a visual reference point for consistent block placement while godbridging, breezily, or even speedbridging.

🛠️ Compatibility

Works on vanilla Minecraft.

Fully compatible with OptiFine.

Can be stacked with other texture packs (just keep this pack on top).

📥 Installation

Download the .zip file from Modrinth.

Place it in your resourcepacks folder.

Enable it in Minecraft’s resource pack menu.

(Optional) Combine with your favorite PvP pack for the best results. ( I recommend RBW 16x by Tory )
